settings.hideSpotifyFullscreenButtonDescription: Hide Spotify's original full-screen button. Requires a restart and may not work on some systems.

autoLaunch.description: **Limitation:** The spotify window cannot go into fullscreen while automatically launching on startup.

activationTypes.description: Choose whether to enter full screen with the button, the F key, or both.

lyricsDescription: **Tip:** Uses Spotify's built-in lyrics when available.
settings.thirdPartyLyrics: Enhance Lyrics from NetEase and QQ Music

sharedLyricsBridge.description: Connect to LyricShiori to share lyrics, manually select lyrics, or adjust lyric delay.

relaxedLyricsMatching.description: Use a more permissive matching strategy, which may occasionally match the wrong lyrics to the current track.

lyricsChineseConversion.description: Convert displayed lyrics and translations to simplified or traditional Chinese.

refreshLyrics.description: Clear the current track's lyric cache and fetch it again immediately.
refreshLyrics.manualSelectionBlocked: The current lyrics were selected manually, so refresh will not replace them. Change or clear the manual lyrics in LyricShiori first.

lyricsDiagnostics.description: Detailed runtime information for troubleshooting lyric loading and matching.

lyricsSize.description: Use the +/- buttons to set a custom size (12–99 px).

description: **New:** Try out the **animated album art** option!
**Warning:** Looks beautiful but may be resource intensive, and is experimental.

settings.appearanceSubHeader: *(Only change if you know what you are doing!)*
settings.backgroundSubHeader: Tune the base motion, beat response, transition, blur strength, and brightness.
settings.verticalMonitorSupportDescription: Enable this if you have a vertical monitor setup. Lyrics will be shown in the bottom, when the window height is greater than the width.
settings.beatBounceDescription: Expand color shapes when motion is high and let them settle back when it is low.

beatResponsePreset.description: Choose how strongly the background reacts to beats.

settings.bpmDrivenMotionDescription: Adjust background flow speed and beat response strength based on the track's BPM.

beatControls.description: These controls apply only while Beat Response is set to Custom.

scale.description: How far color shapes expand outward at high motion values.

warp.description: How strongly beats deform the fluid color shapes.

saturation.description: How much color saturation increases on beats.

speed.description: How much beats temporarily accelerate the background flow.

attack.description: Higher values react faster when motion rises.

release.description: Higher values return to the resting state faster when motion falls.

updates.bundledVersionDescription: The local fullscape.js installed by Spicetify. It remains available when you return to the installed bundle or a GitHub version cannot load.
updates.releaseCacheDescription: Cached GitHub Release versions obtained through this updater. Fullscape uses this cache if the network check fails.
updates.checkingDescription: Checking GitHub for the latest stable release.
updates.upToDate: You are using the latest stable release.
updates.cachedResultWarning: The network check failed; this result is from an older local cache
updates.promptDescription: Version {version} is available; you are using {current}.
updates.autoCheckDescription: Check for new versions. Fullscape will not switch to a newly detected version until you confirm.
updates.versionSelectorDescription: Choose a stable GitHub Release or return to the locally installed bundle.
updates.loadingVersions: Loading stable versions from GitHub Releases…
updates.confirmVersionDescription: You are using v{current}. Confirm to reload Spotify with v{version}.
updates.confirmBundledDescription: Confirm to stop loading the selected release and reload the locally installed bundle (v{version}).
updates.cacheFailed: Update failed: Fullscape v{version} could not be downloaded and verified.
updates.storageFailed: Update failed: local storage is unavailable, so the selected version could not be saved.
updates.reloadFallbackDescription: Spotify did not reload automatically. Run this command in a terminal to apply the confirmed version:
updates.loadFailed: Fullscape v{version} could not be loaded. The installed version is running instead.

general.title: General
general.description: Configure language, startup behavior, display mode, and more.

playback.title: Playback Screen
playback.description: Choose what appears on the playback screen and when it appears.

lyrics.title: Lyrics
lyrics.description: Manage lyric sources, lyric styles, and optional enhancements.

background.title: Background & Motion
background.description: Tune fluid motion, beat response, transitions, blur, and brightness.

appearance.title: Colors & Contrast
appearance.description: Control how album colors are applied to the playback screen.

updates.title: Updates
updates.description: Get updates from GitHub or switch versions.

languageAndLaunch.title: Language & Startup
languageAndLaunch.description: Settings that apply when Spotify starts.

activation.title: Opening Fullscape
activation.description: Choose how full-screen playback is opened and displayed.

troubleshooting.title: Troubleshooting
troubleshooting.description: Diagnostic tools are normally best left off.

controls.title: Playback Controls
controls.description: Set the visibility of the progress bar and transport controls.

trackInfo.title: Track Information
trackInfo.description: Choose which song details appear and how long titles are handled.

upNext.title: Up Next
upNext.description: Control the next-track preview near the end of a song.

lyricsDisplay.title: Display
lyricsDisplay.description: Start with lyric visibility and text size.

lyricSources.title: Sources & Matching
lyricSources.description: Choose where enhanced lyrics come from and how strictly they are matched.

lyricContent.title: Reading Aids
lyricContent.description: Show translations, pronunciation guides, character conversion, and word timing when available.

motion.title: Motion
motion.description: Control the base flow and how strongly it follows the music.

backgroundRendering.title: Rendering
backgroundRendering.description: Adjust the visual finish of the animated background.

playbackTheme.title: Album-based Theme
playbackTheme.description: These options affect the playback screen; settings-window buttons always follow the current cover.

releaseUpdates.title: Release channel
releaseUpdates.description: Automatic checks only notify you. Turn them off to choose a release dynamically or return to the installed bundle.

descriptions.language: Changes the language of this plugin's controls and settings.
descriptions.fullscreen: Use native system fullscreen when opening the playback screen.
descriptions.progressBar: Choose whether the seek bar is always visible, appears on mouse movement, or stays hidden.
descriptions.playerControls: Choose when play, pause, previous, and next controls are visible.
descriptions.showAlbum: Show the album name, optionally together with its release date.
descriptions.icons: Show small visual icons beside playback information.
descriptions.trimTitle: Remove bracketed editions and trailing version text from the current song title.
descriptions.trimAlbum: Shorten the album text when extra edition information is present.
descriptions.upNextDisplay: Smart mode shows the preview only when it is useful near the end of the track.
descriptions.trimTitleUpNext: Apply title shortening to the next-track preview as well.
descriptions.upNextTime: How many seconds before the current track ends the next-track preview may appear.
descriptions.autoHideLyrics: Hide the lyric area when no lyrics are available for the current track.
descriptions.thirdPartyLyrics: Fill missing translations, romanization, furigana, or word timing from NetEase and QQ Music.
descriptions.animationSpeed: Set the resting speed of the fluid background.
descriptions.transitionTime: How long background colors take to blend after the song changes.
descriptions.backgroundBlur: Higher values soften album imagery and fluid shapes more strongly.
descriptions.backgroundBrightness: Set the overall light level of the playback background.
descriptions.themedButtons: Color playback buttons using the current album artwork.
descriptions.themedIcons: Color playback icons using the current album artwork.
descriptions.invertColors: Choose light or dark playback text, or let background brightness decide automatically.
